curriculum_filter: failure-conditioned DCA plus security-CFC hard-but-solvable filtering
state_transaction_semantics: authorize and execute response from pre-state, then commit trust and memory operations for next turn
crosscheck_contract: event_id plus available claim-compatible evidence_ids; roots derived only from Evidence Store
trust_decay: idempotent global per-step decay toward public prior
memory_ingest_semantics: duplicate no-op; new evidence merged with versioned lineage
runtime_governor: evidence-constrained robust public-state hard gate plus scenario-based ranking

performance_controls.checkpoint_policy: one terminal checkpoint per DCA or VDA round stage; keep one actor checkpoint

evaluation_controls.AgentGuard-Zero-Train+Random-K: same trained VDA and K candidates; seeded random candidate
evaluation_controls.AgentGuard-Zero-Train+Mitigation-Heurist: same trained VDA and K candidates; mitigation_v2 heuristic score
evaluation_controls.AgentGuard-Zero-Train+Soft-V5-C: same trained VDA and K candidates; V5-C soft score without hard admission

formal_systems.AgentGuard-Zero-Select: Frozen Qwen + Defender State Layer + V5-C Evidence-Constrained Robust Public-State Governor
formal_systems.AgentGuard-Zero-Full: VDA_3 + Defender State Layer + V5-C Evidence-Constrained Robust Public-State Governor
